subcodes.first_line: This is a book from the Primal Point unto him who hath believed in God and His signs, who hath attained unto the presence of the Throne and was [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من نقطه الاولی الی الذی آمن بالله و آیاته و حضر تلقاء العرش و کان
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @high station of the true believer, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
